metadata.title: Quantum-computing equities (IonQ + cohort) - the threat side of the quantum theme, and the narrative-beta split
metadata.provenance: Web-verified (Motley Fool, Benzinga, SEC 10-Q; IonQ Q1-2026 figures). Grades are honest assessments, not price predictions.
metadata.ties: Pairs with the PQC/defense side (macro-pqc-chips.json: SEALSQ/WISeKey/QRL/MCM): the SAME quantum headlines (e.g., Google Willow) pump BOTH the quantum-computing 'threat' (IonQ et al.) and the 'post-quantum defense' (PQC). Same narrative-beta pattern as macro-critical-minerals + altcoin-lens; same state-as-customer pattern (DoD/DOE) as defense_web.

companies.name: IonQ
facts: ~$12B valuation; Q1-2026 GAAP revenue $64.7M (+755% YoY); FY2026 guide $260-270M; revenue $2M (2021) -> $130M (2025) = first pure-play quantum >$100M rev
~120x trailing sales (rich, but far below peers)
trapped-ion; acquired Oxford Ionics + Vector Atomic (quantum SENSING for government)
IonQ Federal: US Air Force Research Lab + DOE contracts
companies.tie: the 'realest' pure-play; still narrative-amplified; gov/defense as anchor customer (state-as-customer, like MP Materials/Centrus)

theme: Quantum stocks 'ran hard in the 2026 AI+quantum theme; prices can double on a headline and halve just as fast because fundamentals do not yet anchor them.' IonQ is the exception with real (if tiny vs valuation) revenue + government anchor; the rest (RGTI/QBTS/QUBT) are narrative-beta at 800x+ sales.
the_quantum_pqc_duality: Quantum computing threatens current public-key crypto -> drives the post-quantum-cryptography narrative (macro-pqc-chips.json: SEALSQ/WISeKey + alt-coins QRL/MCM). The SAME catalysts pump both the threat (IonQ/RGTI/QBTS) and the defense (PQC) - a closed narrative loop.
assessment: Maps onto the repo's recurring split (equity_in_gold / altcoin-lens): a few real-utility names (IonQ, with revenue + DoD/DOE contracts) and a long tail of narrative-beta (RGTI/QBTS/QUBT at 800x+ sales) riding stacked AI+quantum headlines. State-as-customer (Air Force/DOE) mirrors the defense/energy legs.
